promoted.allowed_when: runtime probe ready + replay pass + template-specific evidence + no hard blocks

needs_review.allowed_when: evidence incomplete, conflict, degraded parser/browser, or taint not fully resolved

conflict.allowed_when: knowledge/source/current project evidence conflict or tool disagreement

rejected.allowed_when: negative control passes as safe, unreachable/mock/test-only, or false-positive exclusion triggered

blocked.allowed_when: out-of-scope, destructive, third-party target, or authorization boundary not proven
